ucs.title: [LLM] LockBit GPO-pushed mass deployment — SYSVOL script drop followed by org-wide shadow-copy deletion
ucs.description: Hunts LockBit's signature self-spreading mechanism: after compromising a Domain Controller, affiliates drop a .bat/.ps1/.exe payload into \SYSVOL\domain\Policies\{GUID}\ (modifying the Default Domain Policy or a new GPO) so every domain-joined endpoint pulls and executes it on the next gpupdate. Within minutes of that DC-side write, you see vssadmin/wmic/bcdedit running on many hosts simultaneously — the LockBit pre-encryption step. This chain is documented for LockBit 2.0/3.0/Black by CISA AA23-075A and Microsoft (DEV-0504 / Storm-0506 affiliates).
ucs.splunk: | tstats summariesonly=true min(_time) AS sysvol_write_time values(Filesystem.file_name) AS script_name values(Filesystem.file_hash) AS script_hash values(Filesystem.process_name) AS writer_process values(Filesystem.user) AS writer_user from datamodel=Endpoint.Filesystem where Filesystem.file_path="*\\SYSVOL\\*" Filesystem.file_path="*\\Policies\\*" (Filesystem.file_name="*.bat" OR Filesystem.file_name="*.cmd" OR Filesystem.file_name="*.ps1" OR Filesystem.file_name="*.vbs" OR Filesystem.file_name="*.exe" OR Filesystem.file_name="*.dll") Filesystem.process_name!="mmc.exe" Filesystem.process_name!="msiexec.exe" Filesystem.process_name!="trustedinstaller.exe" Filesystem.process_name!="tiworker.exe" Filesystem.process_name!="wbengine.exe" by Filesystem.dest | rename Filesystem.dest AS dc | appendcols [ | tstats summariesonly=true min(_time) AS first_impact dc(Processes.dest) AS victim_count values(Processes.dest) AS victims from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where ((Processes.process_name="vssadmin.exe" Processes.process="*delete*shadows*") OR (Processes.process_name="wmic.exe" Processes.process="*shadowcopy*delete*") OR (Processes.process_name="bcdedit.exe" (Processes.process="*recoveryenabled*no*" OR Processes.process="*bootstatuspolicy*ignoreallfailures*")) OR (Processes.process_name="wbadmin.exe" Processes.process="*delete*catalog*")) ] | where isnotnull(first_impact) AND victim_count>=3 AND first_impact>=sysvol_write_time AND first_impact<=(sysvol_write_time+3600) | eval delay_min=round((first_impact-sysvol_write_time)/60,0) | table sysvol_write_time dc script_name script_hash writer_process writer_user first_impact delay_min victim_count victims
ucs.kql:
let LookbackDays = 1d;
let WindowMinutes = 60;
let SysvolWrites = DeviceFileEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(LookbackDays)
| where FolderPath has @"\SYSVOL\" and FolderPath has @"\Policies\"
| where FileName endswith ".bat" or FileName endswith ".cmd" or FileName endswith ".ps1"
      or FileName endswith ".vbs" or FileName endswith ".exe" or FileName endswith ".dll"
| where InitiatingProcessFileName !in~ ("mmc.exe","msiexec.exe","trustedinstaller.exe","tiworker.exe","wbengine.exe","dfsrs.exe")
| where InitiatingProcessAccountName !endswith "$"     // exclude machine acct GPO replication
| project SysvolWriteTime=Timestamp, DCDevice=DeviceName, ScriptName=FileName,
          ScriptPath=FolderPath, ScriptSHA256=SHA256,
          WriterProcess=InitiatingProcessFileName, WriterAccount=InitiatingProcessAccountName;
let MassImpact = DeviceProcessEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(LookbackDays)
| where AccountName !endswith "$"
| where (FileName =~ "vssadmin.exe" and ProcessCommandLine has "delete" and ProcessCommandLine has "shadows")
     or (FileName =~ "wmic.exe" and ProcessCommandLine has "shadowcopy" and ProcessCommandLine has "delete")
     or (FileName =~ "bcdedit.exe" and (ProcessCommandLine has "recoveryenabled" or ProcessCommandLine has "bootstatuspolicy"))
     or (FileName =~ "wbadmin.exe" and ProcessCommandLine has "delete" and ProcessCommandLine has "catalog")
| summarize VictimCount=dcount(DeviceName), FirstImpact=min(Timestamp), LastImpact=max(Timestamp),
            Victims=make_set(DeviceName, 50), SampleCmds=make_set(ProcessCommandLine, 10);
SysvolWrites
| extend _k=1
| join kind=inner (MassImpact | extend _k=1) on _k
| where FirstImpact between (SysvolWriteTime .. SysvolWriteTime + WindowMinutes * 1m)
| where VictimCount >= 3                              // 3+ hosts impacted within 60m of GPO drop
| project SysvolWriteTime, DCDevice, ScriptName, ScriptSHA256, WriterAccount, WriterProcess,
          FirstImpact, DelayMin=datetime_diff('minute', FirstImpact, SysvolWriteTime),
          VictimCount, Victims, SampleCmds
| order by SysvolWriteTime desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
let LookbackDays = 1d;
let WindowMinutes = 60;
let SysvolWrites = ImFileEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(LookbackDays)
| where TargetFilePath has @"\SYSVOL\" and TargetFilePath has @"\Policies\"
| where TargetFileExtension in~ ("bat","cmd","ps1","vbs","exe","dll")
| where ActingProcessName !in~ ("mmc.exe","msiexec.exe","trustedinstaller.exe","tiworker.exe","wbengine.exe","dfsrs.exe")
| where ActorUsername !endswith "$"
| project SysvolWriteTime=TimeGenerated, DCDevice=DvcHostname, ScriptName=TargetFileName,
          ScriptPath=TargetFilePath, ScriptSHA256=TargetFileSHA256,
          WriterProcess=ActingProcessName, WriterAccount=ActorUsername;
let MassImpact = SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(LookbackDays)
| where EventID == 4688
| where Account !endswith "$"
| where (NewProcessName endswith "\\vssadmin.exe" and CommandLine has "delete" and CommandLine has "shadows")
     or (NewProcessName endswith "\\wmic.exe" and CommandLine has "shadowcopy" and CommandLine has "delete")
     or (NewProcessName endswith "\\bcdedit.exe" and (CommandLine has "recoveryenabled" or CommandLine has "bootstatuspolicy"))
     or (NewProcessName endswith "\\wbadmin.exe" and CommandLine has "delete" and CommandLine has "catalog")
| summarize VictimCount=dcount(Computer), FirstImpact=min(TimeGenerated), LastImpact=max(TimeGenerated),
            Victims=make_set(Computer, 50), SampleCmds=make_set(CommandLine, 10);
SysvolWrites
| extend _k=1
| join kind=inner (MassImpact | extend _k=1) on _k
| where FirstImpact between (SysvolWriteTime .. SysvolWriteTime + WindowMinutes * 1m)
| where VictimCount >= 3
| project SysvolWriteTime, DCDevice, ScriptName, ScriptSHA256, WriterAccount, WriterProcess,
          FirstImpact, DelayMin=datetime_diff('minute', FirstImpact, SysvolWriteTime),
          VictimCount, Victims, SampleCmds
| order by SysvolWriteTime desc
ucs.rationale: Generic ransomware detections fire on shadow-copy deletion alone — noisy and after-the-fact. LockBit's distinguishing tradecraft (vs Conti, ALPHV, Akira) is using GPO modification on a compromised DC for fan-out, rather than PsExec or Cobalt Strike push. Anchoring on a SYSVOL/Policies write by a non-MMC process and then correlating to multi-host vssadmin/bcdedit within 60 minutes catches LockBit's

ucs.title: [LLM] LockBit pre-encryption exfil — StealBit/rclone egress to MEGA followed by shadow-copy deletion on the same host
ucs.description: Detects LockBit's documented 'double-extortion' staging pattern: data is exfiltrated using StealBit (their custom in-house tool, often planted as a small PE in C:\ or %TEMP%) or rclone with a MEGA remote, and within hours the same host runs vssadmin/wmic/bcdedit to inhibit recovery before the LockBit encryptor fires. This sequence is unique to LockBit-affiliated intrusions (CISA AA23-325A, Microsoft Storm-0506) — Akira/BlackCat tend to prefer FileZilla/WinSCP and different cloud destinations.
ucs.splunk: | tstats summariesonly=true min(_time) AS exfil_start max(_time) AS exfil_end sum(All_Traffic.bytes_out) AS bytes_out values(All_Traffic.process) AS exfil_cmd values(All_Traffic.dest) AS exfil_dest values(All_Traffic.process_name) AS exfil_proc from datamodel=Network_Traffic.All_Traffic where (All_Traffic.dest="*mega.nz" OR All_Traffic.dest="*mega.co.nz" OR All_Traffic.dest="*mega.io" OR All_Traffic.dest="*userstorage.mega.co.nz" OR All_Traffic.process_name="rclone.exe" OR All_Traffic.process_name="stealbit.exe" OR All_Traffic.process_name="mm.exe") All_Traffic.process_name!="megasync.exe" All_Traffic.process_name!="megacmdserver.exe" All_Traffic.process_name!="chrome.exe" All_Traffic.process_name!="msedge.exe" All_Traffic.process_name!="firefox.exe" by All_Traffic.src | rename All_Traffic.src AS src | join type=inner src [ | tstats summariesonly=true min(_time) AS impact_time values(Processes.process) AS impact_cmd values(Processes.process_name) AS impact_proc from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where ((Processes.process_name="vssadmin.exe" Processes.process="*delete*shadows*") OR (Processes.process_name="wmic.exe" Processes.process="*shadowcopy*delete*") OR (Processes.process_name="bcdedit.exe" (Processes.process="*recoveryenabled*no*" OR Processes.process="*bootstatuspolicy*ignoreallfailures*")) OR (Processes.process_name="wbadmin.exe" Processes.process="*delete*catalog*")) by Processes.dest | rename Processes.dest AS src ] | where impact_time>=exfil_start AND impact_time<=(exfil_end+14400) | eval delay_min=round((impact_time-exfil_start)/60,0), bytes_out_mb=round(bytes_out/1024/1024,1) | table src exfil_start exfil_proc exfil_cmd exfil_dest bytes_out_mb impact_time impact_proc impact_cmd delay_min | sort - impact_time
ucs.kql:
let LookbackDays = 7d;
let CorrelationHours = 4h;
let MegaIndicators = dynamic(["mega.nz","mega.co.nz","mega.io","userstorage.mega.co.nz","api.mega.co.nz"]);
let ExfilOps = DeviceNetworkEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(LookbackDays)
| where RemoteIPType == "Public"
| where (RemoteUrl has_any (MegaIndicators))
     or (InitiatingProcessFileName =~ "rclone.exe")
     or (InitiatingProcessFileName in~ ("stealbit.exe","mm.exe") and isempty(InitiatingProcessVersionInfoCompanyName))
| where InitiatingProcessFileName !in~ ("megasync.exe","megacmdserver.exe","msedge.exe","chrome.exe","firefox.exe","brave.exe")
| where InitiatingProcessAccountName !endswith "$"
| summarize ExfilStart=min(Timestamp), ExfilEnd=max(Timestamp), ConnCount=count(),
            ExfilProc=any(InitiatingProcessFileName), ExfilCmd=any(InitiatingProcessCommandLine),
            ExfilDest=make_set(RemoteUrl, 20), ExfilUser=any(InitiatingProcessAccountName)
            by DeviceId, DeviceName;
let Impact = DeviceProcessEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(LookbackDays)
| where AccountName !endswith "$"
| where (FileName =~ "vssadmin.exe" and ProcessCommandLine has "delete" and ProcessCommandLine has "shadows")
     or (FileName =~ "wmic.exe" and ProcessCommandLine has "shadowcopy" and ProcessCommandLine has "delete")
     or (FileName =~ "bcdedit.exe" and (ProcessCommandLine has "recoveryenabled" or ProcessCommandLine has "bootstatuspolicy"))
     or (FileName in~ ("powershell.exe","pwsh.exe") and ProcessCommandLine has_any ("Get-WmiObject Win32_Shadowcopy","Remove-WmiObject Win32_Shadowcopy","Win32_ShadowCopy"))
| project ImpactTime=Timestamp, DeviceId, ImpactProc=FileName, ImpactCmd=ProcessCommandLine, ImpactUser=AccountName;
ExfilOps
| join kind=inner Impact on DeviceId
| where ImpactTime between (ExfilStart .. ExfilEnd + CorrelationHours)
| project DeviceName, ExfilUser, ExfilStart, ImpactTime,
          DelayMin=datetime_diff('minute', ImpactTime, ExfilStart),
          ExfilProc, ExfilCmd, ExfilDest, ConnCount, ImpactProc, ImpactCmd, ImpactUser
| order by ImpactTime desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
let LookbackDays = 7d;
let CorrelationHours = 4h;
let MegaIndicators = dynamic(["mega.nz","mega.co.nz","mega.io","userstorage.mega.co.nz","api.mega.co.nz"]);
let ExfilOps = ImNetworkSession
| where TimeGenerated > ago(LookbackDays)
| where (DstHostname has_any (MegaIndicators)) or (Url has_any (MegaIndicators))
     or ActingProcessName =~ "rclone.exe"
     or ActingProcessName in~ ("stealbit.exe","mm.exe")
| where ActingProcessName !in~ ("megasync.exe","megacmdserver.exe","msedge.exe","chrome.exe","firefox.exe","brave.exe")
| where ActorUsername !endswith "$"
| summarize ExfilStart=min(TimeGenerated), ExfilEnd=max(TimeGenerated), ConnCount=count(),
            ExfilProc=any(ActingProcessName), ExfilCmd=any(ActingProcessCommandLine),
            ExfilDest=make_set(DstHostname, 20), ExfilUser=any(ActorUsername)
            by Computer=DvcHostname;
let Impact = SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(LookbackDays)
| where EventID == 4688
| where Account !endswith "$"
| where (NewProcessName endswith "\\vssadmin.exe" and CommandLine has "delete" and CommandLine has "shadows")
     or (NewProcessName endswith "\\wmic.exe" and CommandLine has "shadowcopy" and CommandLine has "delete")
     or (NewProcessName endswith "\\bcdedit.exe" and (CommandLine has "recoveryenabled" or CommandLine has "bootstatuspolicy"))
     or ((NewProcessName endswith "\\powershell.exe" or NewProcessName endswith "\\pwsh.exe") and CommandLine has_any ("Win32_Shadowcopy","Remove-WmiObject Win32_Shadowcopy"))
| project ImpactTime=TimeGenerated, Computer, ImpactProc=NewProcessName, ImpactCmd=CommandLine, ImpactUser=Account;
ExfilOps
| join kind=inner Impact on Computer
| where ImpactTime between (ExfilStart .. ExfilEnd + CorrelationHours)
| project Computer, ExfilUser, ExfilStart, ImpactTime,
          DelayMin=datetime_diff('minute', ImpactTime, ExfilStart),
          ExfilProc, ExfilCmd, ExfilDest, ConnCount, ImpactProc, ImpactCmd, ImpactUser
| order by ImpactTime desc
ucs.rationale: MEGA + rclone alone produces benign hits (devs uploading work, prosumers using megasync) — and shadow-copy deletion alone catches every late-stage ransomware family. The actor-specific signal is the *temporal pairing on the same host*: LockBit's TTP playbook stages exfil via StealBit/rclone-to-MEGA and detonates the encryptor on the same victim within hours. Akira/BlackCat tend to use rclone-to-S3

_sentinel_field_issues.message: `ActingProcessName` is not a column of ImNetworkSession, SecurityEvent; it does exist on ImProcessCreate, ImFileEvent, ImRegistryEvent.
`ActorUsername` is not a column of ImNetworkSession, SecurityEvent; it does exist on ImProcessCreate, ImAuthentication, ImFileEvent, ImRegistryEvent.
`ActingProcessCommandLine` is not a column of ImNetworkSession, SecurityEvent; it does exist on ImProcessCreate, ImFileEvent, ImRegistryEvent.
